description: CZ, the founder of Binance, shares his journey from a poker table in 2013 to becoming the richest man in crypto, worth over $60 billion. He discusses his initial skepticism about Bitcoin, his decision to invest $1 million by selling his apartment, and the challenges he faced, including a 70% crash in Bitcoin's value. Despite criticism from friends and family, CZ focused on building Binance, which became the largest crypto exchange in the world within five years.
topic_summary: CZ's transformation from a poker player to the richest man in crypto, highlighting his early investment in Bitcoin, the founding of Binance, and his philosophy on money and success. Key moments include his initial discovery of Bitcoin [t=36:06], his $1 million investment [t=121:60], and Binance's rapid growth [t=210:92].
